meaning: n.国际法专家,政评作家,广告员
examples: It was James Mill who was the best publicist for utilitarian ideas on government.
Pitt's personal publicist, Cindy Guagenti, confirmed the donation.
A sharp publicist, he switched sides, made enemies and faced threats.
Manzarek died Monday in Rosenheim, Germany, surrounded by his family, said publicist Heidi Robinson-Fitzgerald.
All it takes is the right publicist to conjure the media fairy, and presto!
